info.title: AIsa Video Generation API (async)
info.description: Asynchronous video generation. Submit a task via `POST /apis/v1/services/aigc/video-generation/video-synthesis`, then poll `GET /apis/v1/services/aigc/tasks/{task_id}` until the status is `SUCCEEDED` or `FAILED`.

post.description:
Submit an asynchronous video generation task. Returns a `task_id` you then poll via `GET /apis/v1/services/aigc/tasks/{task_id}`.

**Models.** Four Wan variants are accepted on this single endpoint:

| Model | Kind | Image input field |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `wan2.6-t2v` | text-to-video | _n/a_ |
| `wan2.6-i2v` | image-to-video | `input.img_url` |
| `wan2.7-t2v` | text-to-video | _n/a_ |
| `wan2.7-i2v` | image-to-video | `input.media` ⚠️ *not* `input.img_url` |

**Header.** `X-DashScope-Async: enable` is required.

**Body.** `model` and `input.prompt` are always required. For i2v, provide a reference image using the field indicated in the table above — `wan2.6-i2v` uses `input.img_url` (string URL), while `wan2.7-i2v` uses `input.media` (array of URLs).

Failed tasks (e.g., invalid prompt, missing required field) are **not billed** — the task-status response returns `task_status: "FAILED"` with a `code` and `message`.

parameters.name: X-DashScope-Async
parameters.description: Must be `enable` to run asynchronously (the only mode currently supported).

x-doc.desc_en: Switches the request into asynchronous task mode, which is the only mode this endpoint runs in.
x-doc.title_zh: 将请求切换为异步任务模式，也是该接口唯一支持的模式。

model.description: Video generation model. Use `-t2v` suffix for text-to-video, `-i2v` for image-to-video. **Note the i2v schema difference:** `wan2.6-i2v` takes a reference image via `input.img_url` (string), while `wan2.7-i2v` takes it via `input.media` (array).

x-doc.desc_en: Selects which Wan generation model handles the job; the suffix distinguishes text-to-video from image-to-video, and the two image-to-video variants take the reference image through different fields.
x-doc.title_zh: 选择由哪个 Wan 模型来处理任务；后缀区分文生视频与图生视频，两个图生视频变体通过不同字段传入参考图。

input.description: Required body container. `prompt` is always required; image inputs depend on the model (see field descriptions).

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the video. Must contain words — empty or whitespace-only prompts fail upstream with `prompt must contain words`.

x-doc.desc_en: Text describing the video to generate; must contain actual words, as empty or whitespace-only prompts are rejected upstream.
x-doc.title_zh: 描述要生成视频的文本提示词；必须包含实际词语，纯空白会被上游拒绝。

x-doc.desc_en: Text describing what to keep out of the generated video.
x-doc.title_zh: 描述希望在生成视频中避免出现的内容。

img_url.description: Reference image URL. **Required** for `wan2.6-i2v`. Ignored by t2v models. **Do NOT use for `wan2.7-i2v`** — that model uses `media` instead.

x-doc.desc_en: URL of the reference image for the `wan2.6-i2v` image-to-video model; text-to-video models ignore it, and `wan2.7-i2v` uses `input.media` instead.
x-doc.title_zh: wan2.6-i2v 图生视频模型的参考图链接；文生视频模型会忽略它，wan2.7-i2v 改用 input.media。

media.description: Reference image URLs as an array. **Required** for `wan2.7-i2v`. Do NOT use `img_url` with `wan2.7-i2v` — the upstream validator rejects submissions without `input.media`.

x-doc.desc_en: Reference image URLs supplied as an array, used by the `wan2.7-i2v` image-to-video model; do not use `input.img_url` with that model.
x-doc.title_zh: 以数组形式传入的参考图链接，供 wan2.7-i2v 图生视频模型使用；该模型不要改用 input.img_url。

x-doc.desc_en: URL of an optional reference audio track.
x-doc.title_zh: 可选的参考音频链接。

x-doc.desc_en: Container for the generation inputs (prompt and optional reference image/audio).
x-doc.title_zh: 生成输入的容器（提示词及可选的参考图、参考音频）。

x-doc.desc_en: Output resolution of the generated video.
x-doc.title_zh: 生成视频的输出分辨率。

x-doc.desc_en: Length of the generated clip, in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 生成片段的时长，单位为秒。

x-doc.desc_en: Whether the output is a single continuous shot or stitched from multiple shots.
x-doc.title_zh: 输出为单一连续镜头还是由多个镜头拼接。

x-doc.desc_en: Whether to overlay a watermark on the generated video.
x-doc.title_zh: 是否在生成视频上叠加水印。

x-doc.desc_en: Random seed controlling generation; reusing the same seed with identical inputs reproduces the same output.
x-doc.title_zh: 控制生成的随机种子；在相同输入下复用同一种子可复现相同结果。

x-doc.desc_en: Container for generation tuning options such as resolution, duration, and seed.
x-doc.title_zh: 生成调节项的容器，如分辨率、时长、随机种子等。

input.prompt: cinematic close-up, slow push-in, shallow depth of field
gentle camera orbit, golden hour lighting
wide sweeping shot of a neon cyberpunk skyline at dusk

wan27_i2v.summary: wan2.7-i2v — image-to-video (uses media ARRAY, not img_url)

input.prompt: gentle zoom with parallax, cinematic color grading

x-doc.desc_en: Identifier of the created task; pass it to `getVideoSynthesisTask` to poll for the result.
x-doc.title_zh: 所创建任务的标识，传给 getVideoSynthesisTask 轮询结果。

x-doc.desc_en: Lifecycle status of the task right after creation, before processing begins.
x-doc.title_zh: 任务创建之后、开始处理之前的生命周期状态。

x-doc.desc_en: Container for the newly created task's identifier and initial status.
x-doc.title_zh: 新建任务的标识与初始状态的容器。

x-doc.desc_en: Identifier of this API call, useful for tracing and support.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次接口调用的标识，便于追踪与排障。

401.description: Missing or invalid AIsa API key.

500.description:
`model not supported` (the model isn't routed through this endpoint) or `input param is required` (body missing `input`).

Note: for `wan2.7-i2v`, submission **succeeds with HTTP 200** even without the image input — the task later lands in `FAILED` status with `code: "InvalidParameter"` and `message: "Field required: input.media"`.

x-doc.heading_zh: 创建视频生成任务 createVideoSynthesisTask
x-doc.desc_en: Submit an asynchronous text-to-video or image-to-video generation job on one of the Wan models and get back a `task_id` to poll with `getVideoSynthesisTask`. The async header must be enabled, and image-to-video models differ in how the reference image is supplied (`input.img_url` vs `input.media`).
x-doc.description_zh: 在某个 Wan 模型上提交异步的文生视频或图生视频任务，返回可交给 getVideoSynthesisTask 轮询的 task_id。需开启异步请求头，且不同图生视频模型传参考图的字段不同（input.img_url 与 input.media）。

get.description:
Poll the status and result of a task created by `POST /apis/v1/services/aigc/video-generation/video-synthesis`. The `task_id` is a **path parameter**, not a query string.

Suggested polling: every 3–5 seconds, with a hard timeout around 5 minutes.

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Task ID returned by the video-synthesis create call. Unknown IDs return `task_status: "UNKNOWN"` (HTTP 200).

x-doc.desc_en: Identifier of the task to query, as returned by `createVideoSynthesisTask`; unrecognized IDs come back with an unknown status rather than an error.
x-doc.title_zh: 要查询的任务标识，由 createVideoSynthesisTask 返回；无法识别的 ID 会返回未知状态而非报错。

200.description: Task status response. Always HTTP 200 — inspect `output.task_status` to tell lifecycle states apart.

x-doc.desc_en: Identifier of the queried task.
x-doc.title_zh: 所查询任务的标识。

x-doc.desc_en: Current lifecycle status of the task; drives whether you keep polling, read the result, or inspect the failure fields.
x-doc.title_zh: 任务当前的生命周期状态；据此决定继续轮询、读取结果还是查看失败字段。

video_url.description: Present on `SUCCEEDED`. Short-lived URL — download and persist the video before it expires.

x-doc.desc_en: Link to the generated video, present once the task succeeds; it is short-lived, so download and persist the video promptly.
x-doc.title_zh: 生成视频的链接，任务成功后才出现；该链接有效期短，请尽快下载并自行保存。

orig_prompt.description: The original prompt as stored by the upstream provider.

x-doc.desc_en: The original prompt as stored by the upstream provider.
x-doc.title_zh: 上游服务保存的原始提示词。

x-doc.desc_en: When the task was accepted.
x-doc.title_zh: 任务被受理的时间。

scheduled_time.description: When the task was scheduled for execution.

x-doc.desc_en: When the task was scheduled for execution.
x-doc.title_zh: 任务被调度执行的时间。

end_time.description: When the task reached a terminal state.

x-doc.desc_en: When the task reached a terminal state.
x-doc.title_zh: 任务到达终态的时间。

x-doc.desc_en: Machine-readable error code, present when the task failed.
x-doc.title_zh: 机器可读的错误码，任务失败时出现。

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable failure reason, present when the task failed.
x-doc.title_zh: 可读的失败原因，任务失败时出现。

x-doc.desc_en: Container for the task's current status and, once finished, its result or failure details.
x-doc.title_zh: 任务当前状态的容器，任务结束后还含结果或失败详情。

input_video_duration.description: Duration of any input video reference (0 when none).

x-doc.desc_en: Duration of any input video reference, in seconds; zero when no input video was provided.
x-doc.title_zh: 输入视频参考的时长（秒），未提供输入视频时为 0。

output_video_duration.description: Duration of the generated video in seconds.

x-doc.desc_en: Duration of the generated video, in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 生成视频的时长，单位为秒。

x-doc.desc_en: The duration figure used as the basis for billing.
x-doc.title_zh: 用作计费依据的时长数值。

x-doc.desc_en: Number of videos produced by the task.
x-doc.title_zh: 任务生成的视频数量。

size.description: Actual dimensions of the generated video, formatted as `WIDTH*HEIGHT` (e.g., `1920*1080`). Note the `*` separator. Present on `wan2.6-*` outputs.

x-doc.desc_en: Actual pixel dimensions of the generated video, given as width by height.
x-doc.title_zh: 生成视频的实际像素尺寸，以宽乘高的形式给出。

ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the output (e.g., `16:9`). Present on `wan2.7-t2v` outputs.

x-doc.desc_en: Aspect ratio of the generated video.
x-doc.title_zh: 生成视频的宽高比。

SR.description: Super-resolution output height. `wan2.6-t2v` upscales 720P input to 1080. `wan2.6-i2v`, `wan2.7-t2v`, `wan2.7-i2v` return 720.

x-doc.desc_en: Super-resolution output height the video was upscaled to.
x-doc.title_zh: 视频经超分辨率放大后的输出高度。

x-doc.desc_en: Container for resource-usage figures, present once the task succeeds.
x-doc.title_zh: 资源用量数据的容器，任务成功后出现。

x-doc.desc_en: Identifier of this API call, useful for tracing and support.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次接口调用的标识，便于追踪与排障。

output.orig_prompt: cinematic close-up, slow push-in, shallow depth of field

401.description: Missing or invalid AIsa API key.

500.description: `unsupported uri` — check the path. The correct pattern is `/services/aigc/tasks/{task_id}`, not `/services/aigc/tasks?task_id=`.

x-doc.heading_zh: 查询视频生成任务结果 getVideoSynthesisTask
x-doc.desc_en: Poll the status and result of a job created by `createVideoSynthesisTask`. Read `output.task_status` to tell lifecycle states apart; on success the playable video URL appears in `output.video_url`.
x-doc.description_zh: 轮询由 createVideoSynthesisTask 创建的任务的状态与结果。通过 output.task_status 区分各生命周期状态，成功后可在 output.video_url 取到视频地址。
